title: Play Time Display
description: Display the current world's play time in a GUI display
body:
## Display the current world's play time in a GUI display

### Config options:
- X position of overlay (default: 4)
- Y position of overlay (default: 4)
- Color of overlay text (default: 0xFFFFFF)
- Drop shadow for overlay text (default: true)
- Use the default statistic format instead of YYDDHHMMSS (default: false)

<hr>

![In-game display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b729ea22844550a508f7fa6a72c6a62f9400152.png)
